overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark nature trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, showing tall grass and bushes lining a dirt path with distant trees visible against a night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path, sweeping the flashlight across the trail ahead to navigate the dark terrain

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail with visible tire tracks and scattered stones
tall dry grass and reeds lining the left side of the path
dense leafy bushes that become visible as the camera progresses along the trail
tall grass and vegetation lining the right side of the path
tall coniferous tree silhouette visible against the dark night sky
faint outline of forest trees visible in the distance through the darkness

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily along a narrow dirt trail through dense vegetation at night. A flashlight illuminates the path ahead, revealing tall grass and bushes lining the route, with tree silhouettes visible in the distance against the dark sky. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated, with no other characters or vehicles present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a secluded nature trail that maintains a tense, isolated atmosphere under the cover of night. It begins with a steady advance down a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to reveal the immediate terrain. As the camera pushes forward, the beam illuminates dense vegetation and tall grass that crowd the edges of the route. The scene then expands slightly to show the silhouettes of distant trees standing against a dark, empty sky before the path continues deeper into the quiet wilderness.
